name: Standard Mutual NDA
description: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement for commercial discussions

sections.title: Preamble
sections.body: This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{ effective_date }} by and between {{ party_a_name }} ("Party A") and {{ party_b_name }} ("Party B").

sections.title: Definition of Confidential Information
sections.body: "Confidential Information" means any non-public technical, business, financial, legal, or other information disclosed by either party to the other, whether in written, oral, electronic, or visual form, that is designated as confidential or that a reasonable person would understand to be confidential.

sections.title: Obligations of Receiving Party
sections.body: The Receiving Party shall: (a) hold Confidential Information in strict confidence; (b) not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent; (c) use it solely for the purpose of evaluating a potential business relationship; (d) protect it using no less than reasonable care; (e) promptly notify the Disclosing Party of any unauthorized use or disclosure.

sections.title: Term and Termination
sections.body: This Agreement shall remain in effect for {{ term_years }} year(s) from the Effective Date. Either party may terminate this Agreement upon 30 days' written notice. The confidentiality obligations shall survive termination for a period of 3 years.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.body: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{ governing_law }}, without regard to its conflict of laws principles.
